div.p: The First Committee of the United Nations General Assembly met on the afternoon of December 13 from 3 to 6:15 p. m., at which time it approved by a vote of 51 to 5, with 1 abstention, the 13-power resolution (A/C.1/641) introduced on the preceding day (see editorial note, page 1524); for the record of the meeting, see U.N. document A/C.1/SR.417. The resolution was then forwarded to the General Assembly with an interim report from the First Committee recommending its adoption (A/1717).
